config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap punya perlindungan utama karena tanpa itu, kepentingan masyarakat bisa dengan mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap orang yang lemah atau minoritas. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh menghapus martabat, kebebasan, dan keadilan bagi tiap orang. Di Indonesia, saya melihat masalahnya sering muncul saat nama “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk menekan suara yang berbeda, dan itu menurut saya berbahaya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective in China, social stability and collective interests matter a great deal, but I have also seen how the phrase "for the greater good" can be used to silence ordinary people or excuse unfair treatment. Individual rights are not a luxury; they are a boundary that keeps society from becoming arbitrary or oppressive. The best approach is balance: protect the public interest, but never at the cost of basic dignity, fairness, and legal rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari pengalaman melihat Indonesia, alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pemaksaan, menutup kritik, atau mengorbankan kelompok kecil yang sebenarnya butuh perlindungan lebih kuat. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi justru masyarakat yang sehat adalah masyarakat yang melindungi hak dasar tiap orang, bukan yang menginjaknya atas nama mayoritas. Jadi bagi saya, prioritasnya harus seimbang, dengan hak individu sebagai batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule. From my perspective in China, I understand why people value collective stability and public order, but I have also seen how easily “the common good” can become a slogan that weakens accountability and leaves ordinary people with too little protection. A healthy society is not one that can override individual rights whenever it wants; it is one that can pursue shared goals while still respecting clear legal limits, dignity, and fairness. If society is allowed to come first in every case, the weakest people are usually the ones who pay the price.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu berada di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat Indonesia, frasa “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembungkaman kritik, penggusuran yang tidak adil, atau pengorbanan kelompok kecil yang suaranya lemah. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi justru masyarakat yang baik adalah masyarakat yang melindungi hak dasar warga, bukan yang memberi cek kosong kepada mayoritas atau negara. Bagi saya, prioritasnya harus jelas: hak individu menjadi batas, lalu kepentingan sosial dijalankan tanpa melanggarnya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support giving society automatic priority over the individual, because in my view that is exactly how abuse gets justified. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people emphasize order, harmony, and collective goals, but I also know how easily those ideas can be used to silence criticism and leave ordinary people with no real protection. Society should have room to pursue the common good, but only within firm limits that protect dignity, fairness, and basic rights. If those limits are weak, then the people who suffer first are usually the least powerful.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
